story.p1: Styria is one of Europe's most fascinating gourmet regions. Gentle hills, fertile soils and a mild climate create ideal conditions for products of exceptional quality.
story.p2: Austria Imperial — Green Gold brings this tradition directly to you: Styrian Pumpkin Seed Oil with Protected Geographical Indication (PGI) and hand-selected horseradish from traditional cultivation.

kernoel.title: The Pumpkin Seed Oil
kernoel.p1: Our pumpkin seed oil comes from the Kiendler oil mill in southern Styria. Here, Styrian pumpkin seeds have been cold-pressed according to traditional methods for generations. The result: a deep green oil with an intense, nutty aroma — the "green gold" of Styria.
kernoel.p2: The EU-protected designation PGI (Protected Geographical Indication) guarantees that only oil from Styria may bear this name. Every bottle is a piece of authentic Austrian culinary culture.

kren.title: The Horseradish
kren.p1: Styrian horseradish from the Hernach family is grown using proven methods and freshly processed. Its sharp spice and full-bodied aroma make it an indispensable companion of Austrian cuisine — whether with boiled beef, on a charcuterie board, or as a refinement for sauces.

directProducer.title: Direct from the Producer
directProducer.text: No middlemen. Our products come directly from the producers to you.

authenticOrigin.title: Authentic Origin
authenticOrigin.text: EU-certified quality. Every product is traceable back to the producer.

verein.title: The Association
verein.p1: Austria Imperial Green Gold is a registered association based in Vienna, Austria. As a non-profit organisation, the association operates the direct-to-consumer sales of Styrian specialities and conducts scientific field studies on AI-powered marketing, translation, and performance.
verein.p2: The association combines the promotion of regional producers with applied research — a model that unites tradition and technology.

expedition.title: The Expedition
expedition.p1: Starting in 2026, the association will launch a 3-year mobile research expedition across 40+ countries in Europe and Central Asia. Focus areas: AI-powered marketing, real-time translation in 40+ languages, and performance tracking under expedition conditions.

contact.heading: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Questions about our products, bulk orders or collaborations? We look forward to your message.

s1.title: § 1 Scope of Application
s1.p1: These General Terms and Conditions (GTC) apply to all orders placed through the online shop of Austria Imperial — Green Gold. By placing an order, you enter into a purchase contract with the association Austria Imperial Green Gold — Association for the Research of AI-Powered Marketing of Regional Specialities, represented by the board (hereinafter referred to as "Provider").
s1.p2: The GTC apply in the version valid at the time of the order. Deviating terms of the customer are not recognised unless the Provider expressly agrees to their validity in writing.
s1.p3: The association pursues charitable purposes. Product sales serve the implementation of scientific field studies on the impact of AI-generated content on the sales of regional specialities, as well as the research of AI translation systems, performance and health parameters, and the AI landscape in Europe (ancillary purpose privilege pursuant to § 1 para. 2 VerG).

s2.title: § 2 Conclusion of Contract
s2.p1: The presentation of products in the online shop does not constitute a legally binding offer, but an invitation to place an order.
s2.p2: By clicking the order button, you place a binding order for the goods contained in the shopping cart. Confirmation of receipt of the order is sent immediately after submission by email (order confirmation).
s2.p3: The purchase contract is concluded when the goods are handed over to the shipping service provider.

s3.title: § 3 Prices and Shipping Costs
s3.p1: All stated prices are final prices and include the statutory value added tax where applicable. In addition, shipping costs apply, which are clearly displayed before completing the order.

s4.title: § 4 Payment
s4.p1: Payment is processed through the payment service provider Stripe. The following payment methods are available: credit card (Visa, Mastercard), SEPA direct debit and other payment methods offered by Stripe.
s4.p2: The invoice amount is charged upon receipt of the order.

s5.title: § 5 Delivery
s5.p1: Delivery is made directly by our producers to the delivery address specified by the customer. For orders with products from different producers, delivery may be made in multiple packages.
s5.p2: The delivery time is usually 3–7 business days within the EU. For deliveries outside the EU, longer delivery times and additional customs duties may apply.

s6.title: § 6 Retention of Title
s6.p1: The delivered goods remain the property of the association until the purchase price has been paid in full.

s7.title: § 7 Warranty
s7.p1: The statutory warranty rights under Austrian Civil Code (ABGB) and Consumer Protection Act (KSchG) apply. Food products are excluded from exchange, provided they were delivered without defects and as described.
s7.p2: Please inspect the goods immediately upon delivery for recognisable defects. We accept complaints by email.

s8.title: § 8 Liability
s8.p1: The association is liable for damages only in cases of intent and gross negligence. In cases of slight negligence, the association is only liable for breach of essential contractual obligations. Liability is limited to the foreseeable damage typical for the contract.

s9.title: § 9 Right of Withdrawal
s9.p1: Consumers are entitled to a statutory right of withdrawal pursuant to the Austrian Distance and Off-Premises Contracts Act (FAGG) and the Consumer Protection Act (KSchG). Please refer to our cancellation policy for details.

s10.title: § 10 Applicable Law
s10.p1: The law of the Republic of Austria applies, excluding the UN Convention on Contracts for the International Sale of Goods. For consumers within the EU, the mandatory consumer protection provisions of their country of residence remain unaffected.

s11.title: § 11 Final Provisions
s11.p1: Should individual provisions of these GTC be or become invalid, the validity of the remaining provisions shall remain unaffected.

s1.title: 1. Privacy at a Glance
s1.generalText: The following notices provide a simple overview of what happens to your personal data when you visit this website. Personal data is any data that can be used to personally identify you.
s1.collectionText1: Data processing on this website is carried out by the association Austria Imperial Green Gold — Association for the Research of AI-Powered Marketing of Regional Specialities. Contact details can be found in the legal notice of this website.
s1.collectionText2: Your data is collected in part by you providing it to us (e.g. in an order form). Other data is collected automatically or with your consent when you visit the website by our IT systems. This is primarily technical data (e.g. internet browser, operating system or time of page access).

s2.title: 2. Responsible Body
s2.legalName: Association for the Research of AI-Powered Marketing of Regional Specialities
s2.zvr: ZVR Number: [to be entered after registration]
s2.address:
Registered seat: Austria
[Address to be added after registration]
s2.text: The responsible body is the natural or legal person who alone or jointly with others decides on the purposes and means of the processing of personal data.

s3.title: 3. Data Processor
s3.text1: The association uses Auryx AI LLC as a data processor pursuant to Art. 28 GDPR for the operation of technical infrastructure (content engine, automation, hosting).
s3.text2: A data processing agreement (DPA) between the association and Auryx AI LLC governs the GDPR-compliant processing.
s3.auryx: Auryx AI LLC, 30 N Gould St Ste N, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

s4.title: 4. Your Rights
s4.intro: You have the right at any time to:
rights: Obtain information about your stored personal data (Art. 15 GDPR)
Request correction of inaccurate data (Art. 16 GDPR)
Request deletion of your data (Art. 17 GDPR)
Revoke a given consent at any time (Art. 7 para. 3 GDPR)
Lodge a complaint with the Austrian Data Protection Authority (dsb.gv.at)
s4.outro: For this purpose and for any further questions regarding data protection, you can contact us at any time.

s5.title: 5. Data Collection on This Website
s5.serverLogsText1: The provider of the pages automatically collects and stores information in so-called server log files, which your browser automatically transmits to us. These are: browser type and version, operating system used, referrer URL, hostname of the accessing computer, time of the server request and IP address.
s5.serverLogsText2: This data is not merged with other data sources. The basis for data processing is Art. 6 para. 1 lit. f GDPR (legitimate interest in technical provision).
s5.cookiesText: This website does not use tracking cookies. We only use technically necessary cookies that are required for the operation of the site (e.g. shopping cart, session). Legal basis: Art. 6 para. 1 lit. f GDPR.

s6.title: 6. Orders and Payment Processing
s6.text1: When you order from us, we collect the following data: name, email address, delivery address, billing address and order details. This data is required for contract fulfilment (Art. 6 para. 1 lit. b GDPR).
s6.text2: Payment processing is carried out by Stripe, Inc. (354 Oyster Point Blvd, South San Francisco, CA 94080, USA). We do not receive complete payment data from Stripe (e.g. credit card numbers). Stripe processes your payment data in accordance with their privacy policy:

s7.title: 7. Data in the Context of the Field Studies
s7.text1: The association conducts scientific field studies to research how AI-generated content influences the sales of regional specialities in international markets. The research additionally encompasses: AI-powered real-time translation systems in field trials, physical performance and metabolic markers under long-term mobile conditions, and documentation of the AI landscape in Europe.
s7.text2: As part of these studies, purchase data and any survey results are anonymised and evaluated in aggregate form. No personal data is published in study reports. The evaluation is based exclusively on aggregated, non-traceable metrics (e.g. total revenue, number of orders, average order value per market, platform attribution).
s7.text3: Legal basis: Legitimate interest of the association in carrying out its statutory research activities (Art. 6 para. 1 lit. f GDPR, § 2 para. 4–5 of the association statutes). For optional surveys (post-purchase survey), we obtain your explicit consent (Art. 6 para. 1 lit. a GDPR).
s7.text4: You may object to the use of your anonymised purchase data for research purposes at any time by contacting us via email.

s8.title: 8. Disclosure to Third Parties
s8.text1: Your data is passed on to our fulfilment partners (producers) to the extent necessary for contract fulfilment (delivery). This includes: name, delivery address and order details.
s8.text2: In addition, data is shared with the data processor Auryx AI LLC (see Section 3) for technical processing.
s8.text3: Beyond this, no disclosure to third parties takes place unless we are legally obliged to do so.

s9.title: 9. Data Storage and Deletion Concept
s9.text1: Order data is stored for the duration of the statutory retention periods (7 years pursuant to § 132 BAO — Austrian Federal Fiscal Code).
s9.text2: Data of prospective customers (e.g. newsletter, contact form) is deleted after 2 years of inactivity.
s9.text3: Data of study participants (optional surveys) is fully anonymised after completion of the study.
s9.text4: After expiry of the respective retention periods, personal data is deleted or irreversibly anonymised.

s10.title: 10. SSL/TLS Encryption
s10.text: This site uses SSL or TLS encryption for security reasons and to protect the transmission of confidential content. You can recognise an encrypted connection by the fact that the address bar of the browser changes from "http://" to "https://".

s3.title: Board
s3.kassier: Treasurer and Deputy Chairman: Peter Kräcksammer
s3.vertretung: Joint representation by both board members

s4.title: Purpose of the Association
s4.text: Scientific and practical research into how AI-generated content influences the sales of regional specialities in international markets. The research activities include in particular: (a) AI-powered marketing and content creation, (b) physical performance and metabolic markers under long-term mobile conditions, (c) structured nutrition and functional training in an expedition context, (d) AI-powered real-time translation systems in field trials, (e) acceptance and practicality of AI translation in real sales situations, (f) documentation of the AI landscape in Europe with relevance for SMEs. All collected data is processed anonymously and in aggregate form, serving exclusively charitable research purposes (§ 2 para. 4–5 of the association statutes).

s5.title: Value Added Tax
s5.text: To be added after clarification with tax advisor (small business exemption pursuant to § 6 para. 1 Z 27 UStG or regular VAT liability).

s6.title: Responsible for Content according to § 25 MedienG

s7.title: EU Dispute Resolution
s7.text1: The European Commission provides a platform for online dispute resolution (OS):
s7.text2: We are not willing or obliged to participate in dispute resolution proceedings before a consumer arbitration body.

s8.title: Liability for Content
s8.text: As a service provider, we are responsible for our own content on these pages in accordance with general laws pursuant to § 16 ECG. Pursuant to §§ 13 to 17 ECG, however, we as a service provider are not obliged to monitor transmitted or stored third-party information or to investigate circumstances that indicate illegal activity.

s9.title: Liability for Links
s9.text: Our website contains links to external websites of third parties over whose content we have no influence. Therefore, we cannot assume any liability for this third-party content. The respective provider or operator of the pages is always responsible for the content of the linked pages.

s10.title: Copyright
s10.text: The content and works created by the association on these pages are subject to Austrian copyright law. Reproduction, processing, distribution and any type of exploitation outside the limits of copyright law require the written consent of the association.

s11.title: Applicable Law and Jurisdiction

s1.title: Right of Cancellation
s1.p1: You have the right to cancel this contract within fourteen days without giving any reason.
s1.p2: The cancellation period is fourteen days from the day on which you or a third party named by you, who is not the carrier, has taken possession of the goods.
s1.p3: To exercise your right of cancellation, you must inform us by means of a clear statement (e.g. by email) of your decision to cancel this contract:
s1.contact:
Austria Imperial Green Gold — Association for the Research of AI-Powered Marketing of Regional Specialities
Email: info@austriaimperial.com
s1.p4: To meet the cancellation deadline, it is sufficient for you to send the notification of the exercise of the right of cancellation before the cancellation period expires.

s2.title: Consequences of Cancellation
s2.p1: If you cancel this contract, we shall reimburse to you all payments received from you, including the costs of delivery (with the exception of the supplementary costs resulting from your choice of a type of delivery other than the least expensive type of standard delivery offered by us), without undue delay and in any event not later than fourteen days from the day on which we are informed about your decision to cancel this contract.
s2.p2: We will use the same means of payment as you used for the original transaction, unless you have expressly agreed otherwise. In no case will you be charged any fees because of such reimbursement.
s2.p3: We may withhold reimbursement until we have received the goods back or you have supplied evidence of having sent back the goods, whichever is the earliest.

s3.title: Return Shipment
s3.p1: You shall send back the goods without undue delay and in any event not later than fourteen days from the day on which you communicate your cancellation from this contract to us. The deadline is met if you send back the goods before the period of fourteen days has expired.
s3.p2: You will bear the direct cost of returning the goods.

s4.title: Exclusion of the Right of Cancellation
s4.p1: The right of cancellation does not exist for contracts for the delivery of goods which can spoil quickly or whose expiry date would be quickly exceeded.
s4.p2: The right of cancellation expires for contracts for the delivery of sealed goods which are not suitable for return for reasons of health protection or hygiene if their seal has been removed after delivery.
s4.p3: For food products (pumpkin seed oil, horseradish), the right of cancellation is excluded once the seal of the bottle/jar has been opened.

s5.title: Model Cancellation Form
s5.intro: If you want to cancel the contract, please fill out this form and send it back:
s5.to: To: Austria Imperial Green Gold — Association for the Research of AI-Powered Marketing of Regional Specialities, info@austriaimperial.com
s5.body: I/We (*) hereby cancel the contract concluded by me/us (*) for the purchase of the following goods:

telegramBot.title: Expedition Bot
telegramBot.subtitle: Mobile Command Center for the AIGG Expedition

activation.title: Bot Connection
activation.step1Desc: Open the AIGG Expedition Bot in Telegram.
activation.step2Desc: Send /start in the chat. The bot will show your Chat ID.
activation.step3Desc: Copy the Chat ID and paste it below.
activation.invalidChatId: Please enter a valid Chat ID (numbers only)

commands.title: Expedition Commands
commands.subtitle: 8 commands for daily data collection during the expedition

tasting.description: Log a tasting — city, location type, products, rating and notes.
tasting.example: /tasting Vienna, Restaurant, Pumpkin Seed Oil + Horseradish, 4, Great reaction

translation.description: Document AI translation test — language, tool, situation, accuracy score.
translation.example: /translation Slovenian, DeepL, Tasting, 7, Works well offline

ausgabe.description: Log expense with automatic currency conversion (10 currencies supported).

performance.description: Daily health data — HRV, sleep score, steps, training, wellbeing.

expStatus.description: Dashboard — current country, budget, recent tastings, posts this week.

content.description: Trigger content post manually — sends topic to the content pipeline.
content.example: /content Pumpkin seed oil tasting in Istanbul

report.description: 30-day expedition report — tastings, budget, performance, content.

expHelp.description: Show all expedition commands with explanations.

multimedia.title: Multimedia Capabilities
multimedia.subtitle: Beyond text commands, the bot also processes photos, voice messages and documents.

photo.title: Photo Upload
photo.description: Send a photo — GPT-4o Vision automatically analyzes products, detects persons (GDPR check) and can be used as image post or video basis.

voice.title: Voice Messages
voice.description: Send a voice message — Whisper automatically transcribes and interprets the instruction as a command or content description.

documents.title: Documents
documents.description: Send PDFs, images or videos directly — automatically uploaded to the Media Library and available for content production.

workflow.title: Daily Expedition Workflow
workflow.subtitle: How to best use the bot in your daily expedition routine.

morning.title: Get overview
morning.description: Check daily status: current country, budget, tastings, posts.

driving.title: Log expenses
driving.description: Log every payment immediately (diesel, tolls, food).

tasting.title: Document tasting
tasting.description: Record tasting data + send photos from the event.

translation.title: Rate AI translator
translation.description: After each translation test, log language, tool and score.

evening.title: Enter health data
evening.description: Document HRV, sleep score, steps and wellbeing.

weekly.title: Generate report
weekly.description: Retrieve 30-day summary of all expedition data.

meta.title: The Expedition — Austria Imperial Green Gold
meta.description: 3 years, 40+ countries, 40+ languages: The AIGG association's mobile research expedition on AI-powered marketing, translation, and performance.

hero.title: 3 Years. 40+ Countries. 40+ Languages. One Study.
hero.subtitle: A scientific field expedition across Europe and Central Asia — with AI-powered marketing, real-time translation, and performance tracking.

route.title: The Route across 40+ Countries
route.subtitle: From Austria through Southeast Europe, Western Europe, the Baltics, the Caucasus to Central Asia.

phase1.title: Phase 1: Southeast Europe & Balkans
phase1.countries: Austria, Slovenia, Croatia, Bosnia, Montenegro, Albania, North Macedonia, Greece
phase1.focus: AI scene Ljubljana, AI translation: Slovenian, Croatian, Bosnian, Albanian, Greek

phase2.title: Phase 2: Western Europe & Northern Europe
phase2.countries: Italy, France, Spain, Portugal, Belgium, Netherlands, Scandinavia
phase2.focus: Premium markets, EU AI Act Brussels, Mistral AI Paris, AI hubs Amsterdam/Stockholm/Helsinki

phase3.title: Phase 3: Eastern Europe & Baltics
phase3.countries: Estonia, Latvia, Lithuania, Poland, Czech Republic, Slovakia, Hungary, Romania, Bulgaria
phase3.focus: Estonia = most digitised country in the world. AI translation: 9+ rare languages

phase4.title: Phase 4: Turkey & Caucasus
phase4.focus: Bridge between Europe and Asia, cultural crossroads

phase5.title: Phase 5: Central Asia — Main Focus
phase5.countries: Uzbekistan (Tashkent, Samarkand, Bukhara), Kazakhstan (Almaty, Astana), Kyrgyzstan (Bishkek, Issyk-Kul)
phase5.focus: Toughest test: Uzbek, Kazakh, Kyrgyz. Horse culture, steppe horses, nomads

phase6.title: Phase 6: Return
phase6.countries: Option A: Russia (Novosibirsk, Moscow, St. Petersburg) → Finland → Austria. Option B: China (Xinjiang → Shanghai)
phase6.focus: Final data collection, return and analysis

waves.title: 3 Waves across 40+ Countries
waves.subtitle: The study is designed as a multi-year expedition program in three waves — with base phases in Austria for analysis and publication.

wave1.title: Wave 1: Europe → Central Asia → Russia
wave1.description: 30+ countries, 30+ languages. Southeast Europe, Western Europe, Baltics, Turkey, Caucasus, Central Asia, Russia.

base1.title: Base Phase 1: Austria
base1.description: Data analysis Wave 1, interim report, lectures at universities and conferences, sponsor reporting.

wave2.title: Wave 2: China Expedition
wave2.description: Xinjiang → Xi'an → Shanghai → Beijing. 1.4 billion inhabitants, the world's largest consumer market.

base2.title: Base Phase 2: Austria
base2.description: China data analysis, Wave 3 preparation, sponsor reporting and acquisition.

wave3.title: Wave 3: Arabian Region
wave3.description: Jordan → Saudi Arabia → UAE → Oman. Activation ONLY upon geopolitical stabilization.

conclusion.title: Conclusion: Final Analysis
conclusion.description: Final publication, lecture series (TEDx, universities, AI conferences), archiving of all data.

waves.budget: Total budget: approx. EUR 735,000 — modular financing possible (Wave 1 can start independently)

sprinter.title: Mercedes Sprinter 4x4 — Sprinter 1
sprinter.description: Full conversion as living and office vehicle. Mobile headquarters with ergonomic workspace, MacBook Pro 16" M4 Max, external monitor, Starlink internet, sleeping area, bathroom, Thermomix TM7 kitchen, 600W solar, 300Ah LiFePO4.

offroad.title: Mercedes Sprinter 4x4 — Sprinter 2
offroad.description: IDENTICALLY equipped to Sprinter 1. Two identical vehicles mean: double visibility for the conversion sponsor, compatible spare parts, and maximum flexibility.

antigravity.title: Antigravity A1
antigravity.description: Invisible in frame thanks to 360° capture. Minimal regulation worldwide.

hovelair.title: HOVERAir X1 PROMAX
hovelair.description: One per vehicle. No controller needed, tracking drone for everyday use.

macbook.title: MacBook Pro 16" M4 Max
macbook.description: For 8K/360° video editing and local AI inference on the road.

insta360.title: Insta360 X5
insta360.description: Immersive 360° documentation of the entire expedition.

sony.title: Sony A7C II
sony.description: Primary camera for professional photo and video documentation throughout the expedition.

gopro.title: GoPro Hero 13
gopro.description: Rugged action camera for outdoor scenes, horse feeding, and spontaneous shots.

rode.title: RØDE Wireless PRO + NTG5
rode.description: Wireless microphones and shotgun mic for interviews, tastings, and documentation.

thermomix.title: Thermomix TM7
thermomix.description: Structured nutrition on the road — AI-powered cooking for performance optimization in the Sprinter.

garmin.title: Garmin Fenix 8
garmin.description: Continuous monitoring of HRV, sleep, activity, and GPS tracking throughout the entire study.

gimbal.title: DJI RS 4 Mini
gimbal.description: Professional video stabilization for smooth handheld shots in any situation.

f1.question: How does AI-generated content influence sales of regional specialities in international markets?

f2.question: Which content formats (text, image, video) achieve the highest conversion rate per platform?

f3.question: How does the impact of AI content differ across cultural regions?

f4.question: Can an avatar-based approach accelerate brand awareness in new markets?

f5.question: Which platform (Instagram, YouTube, TikTok) delivers the highest ROI per market?

f6.question: How does content quality change with increasing automation?

f7.question: Can AI attribution precisely measure the link between content and revenue?

f8.question: How do B2B partners respond to AI-generated marketing material?

f9.question: What influence does 360° video content have on purchasing decisions?

f10.question: How does physical performance develop under long-term mobile conditions?

f11.question: Which metabolic markers change significantly over the course of a multi-year expedition?

f12.question: Can structured nutrition (Thermomix TM7) strengthen resilience under expedition conditions?

f13.question: How does functional training affect stress responses during everyday expedition life?

f14.question: What influence do different climate zones have on physiological parameters?

f15.question: Does physical discipline correlate with entrepreneurial performance?

f16.question: Can AI translation eliminate the language barrier as an export obstacle?

f17.question: How large are the quality differences between major languages and rare languages?

f18.question: How is AI being adopted and regulated across different European regions?

f19.question: How effective are AI avatars at selling regional premium products compared to traditional product presentations?

f20.question: How does avatar interaction influence brand perception and purchase conversion rates across different cultures?

f21.question: Are AI avatars a scalable sales model for SME exports?

translation_study.title: Real-Time Translation in 40+ Languages
translation_study.description: A continuous research strand: AI-powered real-time translators in field trials. From Google Translate Live to DeepL Voice to AI dubbing — tested in real sales situations.
translation_study.tools: Tools tested: real-time speech translators, AI subtitling for 360° videos, AI-generated product descriptions, AI dubbing
translation_study.metrics: Documented per country: accuracy, customer response, offline capability, dialects, food-specific terminology, trust effect

performance.title: Body and Mind under Expedition Conditions
performance.description: Sports-medical baseline, ongoing wearable tracking (HRV, sleep, activity), structured nutrition, blood tests every 3–4 months, mobile training.

geopolitical.title: Note on the Route
geopolitical.text: The Arabian region is temporarily postponed as an expedition zone due to the current geopolitical situation. Existing networks and partnerships are being maintained. A dedicated expedition wave (Wave 3) is planned once the situation stabilizes.

tracker.title: Follow the Expedition in Real Time
tracker.description: During the expedition, live updates, GPS positions, and expedition reports will be published here.
tracker.newsletter: Subscribe to the newsletter for updates

meta.title: Sponsoring — Austria Imperial Expedition
meta.description: Become a sponsor of the Austria Imperial Research Expedition — 3 years, 40+ countries, 40+ languages.

hero.title: Sponsoring Partnership
hero.subtitle: Join the Austria Imperial Research Expedition as a sponsor — 3 years through 40+ countries with AI-powered documentation, 360° content, and scientific research.

categories.title: Sponsoring Categories
categories.subtitle: Our expedition offers visibility across fourteen specialised areas — each with its own target audience and reach.

cameras360.title: 360° Cameras
cameras360.description: Immersive 360° documentation of the entire expedition — your camera as a window into 40+ countries.

drones.title: Drones
drones.description: Aerial footage in 8K — your drone technology in daily use across 40+ countries.

wearables.title: Wearables & Tracking
wearables.description: Ongoing monitoring of HRV, sleep, and activity — your technology as a research instrument.

vehicle.title: Vehicle Converters
vehicle.description: Two identical Mercedes Sprinter 4x4 — your conversion as a rolling billboard across 3 continents.

internet.title: Internet & Connectivity
internet.description: Reliable internet worldwide — your solution keeps the mobile research lab connected.

kitchen.title: Kitchen & Nutrition
kitchen.description: Structured nutrition on the road — your appliance as a daily companion in the performance module.

cameras.title: Cameras & Video
cameras.description: Professional 4K/8K documentation — your camera technology in a 3-year long-term deployment.

sport.title: Sports & Training Equipment
sport.description: Functional training under expedition conditions — your equipment documented in daily use over 3 years.

supplements.title: Nutritional Supplements
supplements.description: Structured supplementation under extreme travel conditions — scientifically documented.

outdoor.title: Outdoor Equipment
outdoor.description: From Alps to steppes — your equipment in long-term testing across different climate zones.

telemedizin.title: Telemedicine Providers
telemedizin.description: Remote medical care across borders and time zones — your platform in practical testing.

bloodtest.title: Blood Test Laboratories
bloodtest.description: Regular blood analyses every 3–4 months — your diagnostics as a research foundation.

audio.title: Audio Equipment
audio.description: Professional audio recording across 40+ countries — your microphone technology for interviews and documentation.

software.title: Software & AI
software.description: AI-powered translation and content creation — your software as a central research instrument.

presenting.title: Presenting Partner
presenting.description: Maximum visibility as the main sponsor of the expedition — your logo on all vehicles and in every piece of content.

benefits.1: Mention in all 360° videos and social media posts
benefits.2: Exclusive access to research results and data

category.title: Category Partner
category.description: Exclusivity in your sponsoring category — no competing brand in your area.

benefits.0: Exclusive rights in one of the 14 categories
benefits.1: Regular content mentions and product tests
benefits.2: Quarterly reports with usage data and reach

equipment.title: Equipment Partner
equipment.description: In-kind contributions instead of money — your products in daily use, documented and shared.

benefits.1: Honest long-term reviews after expedition end

cta.title: Interested in a Sponsoring Partnership?
cta.description: We welcome your interest in the Austria Imperial Research Expedition. Contact us for a no-obligation conversation about partnership opportunities.

studyNotice.text: This product page is part of a scientific study by AIGG Verein researching AI-powered marketing. Only anonymised, non-personal usage data is collected. Your participation is voluntary and does not affect your purchase.
